title: Codex Account Identity Hardening
scope: Stop relying on email or account id for Codex dedupe.
Explain active auth source in the Accounts UI.
non_goals: Do not implement account activation backup in this phase.
Do not implement automatic account rotation.
Do not query external quota APIs as a requirement.

tasks.title: Add normalized auth path utilities
tasks.details: Added path normalization helpers with trim/~/expansion, resolve, symlink-aware realpath fallback, and stable casing on Windows; wired helpers into auth/config source imports and active profile detection.

tasks.title: Extend account records
tasks.details: Added account payload identity fields (`sourceAuthPath`, `normalizedSourceAuthPath`, `managedAuthPath`, `credentialId`, `fingerprint`) and helper functions to derive identity values in `src/host/account-manager.js`.

tasks.title: Add duplicate warning logic
tasks.details: Warn on likely duplicates without merging accounts solely by email or account id.

tasks.title: Show source path and active state
tasks.details: Render enough source path detail for users to know what profile they will activate.

tasks.title: Test same email across auth paths
tasks.details: Ensure two Codex auth files with the same email can coexist.

implementation_notes.summary: Implemented `normalizeAuthPath` in `src/host/account-manager.js` with tilde expansion, absolute-path resolution, symlink realpath fallback, and Windows casing normalization. Applied it to account auth/config import sources and active auth-path checks in `detectActiveProfile`.
Extended `readAccountsForPayload` account details with source path and fingerprint metadata and added `getCredentialIdFromAuth` / `getAccountFingerprint` helpers in `src/host/account-manager.js`.

Added non-destructive duplicate identity warnings in `src/host/account-manager.js` by grouping account details by credential identity and source path; surfaced warning rows and duplicate badges in `src/webview-template.js` and styled them in `src/webview/styles.js`.

Updated Accounts UI to surface per-account `sourceAuthPath` and explicit native active status in both the overview summary and the account list cards; added active-state source-path context in the overview hero and metadata.

Added regression coverage in `src/webview/render-detail-regression.test.js` for two configured accounts sharing `credentialId` but using different source auth paths; both render independent duplicate warnings and visible auth paths.

acceptance: Two Codex auth files with the same email can coexist.
Active account detection is path or fingerprint based.
UI shows enough source information to understand what will be activated.
Email and account_id are not sole Codex dedupe keys.
